meta.title: Transport Facile – Online Ticketing for Bus Agencies in Côte d'Ivoire
meta.description: Transport Facile digitalises intercity transport agencies in Côte d'Ivoire. Online ticket sales, QR Code boarding, parcel management, real-time dashboard. Operational in 48h. Commission from 2.5%, zero fixed costs.

hero.badge: Built for transport agencies in Côte d'Ivoire
hero.h1_3: Manage your revenue in real time.
hero.subtitle: Your customers book from their phones, your parcels are tracked, your revenue is visible in real time.
hero.subtitleStrong: Operational in 48h, zero fixed costs, your brand.
trust: No fixed fee, you pay on sales

loss.title: What most agencies experience, before they talk to us.
loss.subtitle: We hear this in every first conversation. These situations are not inevitable — each one has a concrete answer.

situations.title: Bookings limited to office hours
situations.description: A customer wanting to travel Monday calls Saturday evening. The counter is closed. They book elsewhere, or leave without a ticket. That window can't be recovered.

situations.title: Parcel tracking by phone and paper ledger
situations.description: "Do you have my parcel?" Without digital tracking, every shipment generates calls for your staff and anxiety for your customer.

situations.title: Revenue hard to reconcile at end of day
situations.description: Paper tickets, parcel revenue, credits, refunds. Reconciling all of this by hand leaves blind spots on what was actually collected.

loss.bridgeText: Each of these situations has a concrete answer,

services.title1: Two tools that transform your agency
services.subtitle: Built for the Ivorian market. Deployed in your brand. Continuously updated.

items.title: ResaBus Core
items.subtitle: Sell your tickets 24/7, even when your counter is closed
items.description: No more customers turning away because your counter was full or closed. With ResaBus Core, your passengers book from their phones at any hour. Your team scans the ticket at boarding in 5 seconds. Your revenue is centralised in real time.
features: Online ticket sales 24/7, without a counter agent
Digital ticket sent to the customer within seconds
Fast QR Code scan at boarding: zero errors, zero fraud
Your daily revenue visible at a glance
Manage your routes, schedules and fares independently
Automatic SMS and email confirmations for your customers
Complete history: no more unclear end-of-day cash reports
Platform deployed in your agency's brand

items.title: ResaBus Colis Core
items.subtitle: Turn your parcel service into a managed revenue stream
items.description: Your customers queue with their parcels, your team juggles tickets and shipments, and parcel revenue remains unclear at the end of the day. ResaBus Colis Core organises everything: the customer books their slot online, you prepare the departure calmly, and every parcel is tracked from the agency to the recipient.
features: Online parcel slot booking, no more queues
Digital handling receipt with QR Code
Real-time tracking: the sender knows where their parcel is
Flexible pricing by weight and destination
Shipment history per customer to build loyalty
Dedicated dashboard for your parcel team

services.comingLabel: And that's not all. New modules are coming soon to cover even more of your agency's needs.

trustBar.title: Simple. Secure. Built for your reality.

usps.title: Extremely easy to use
usps.description: No IT knowledge required. If you can use WhatsApp, you can use our platform. Your agents and customers are up and running in under 10 minutes.

usps.title: Your customers pay how they want
usps.description: Mobile Money, Wave, Orange Money, MTN MoMo, debit card, Stripe: your customers choose their preferred payment method. You collect without friction.

usps.title: Zero fraud risk
usps.description: Every ticket is unique, secure and verifiable by QR Code. No more copied tickets, duplicates, or agents managing the till their own way.

usps.title: Fast to deploy, easy to evolve
usps.description: Your agency is operational in 48h. And with every update, your platform improves automatically, with no service interruption and no extra cost.

trustBar.paymentTitle: Payment methods accepted by your platform
trustBar.paymentCaption: Your customers pay with the method they use every day. You collect directly, securely.

appPreview.subtitle: Here is exactly what ResaBus looks like — on the passenger's mobile, and on the management dashboard.
appPreview.clientCaption: The customer books from their phone, pays with Wave or Orange Money, and receives their QR Code immediately.
appPreview.agencyCaption: The agency manager tracks their revenue, departures and bookings in real time, from anywhere.

howItWorks.title: Your agency online in 48h, hassle-free
howItWorks.subtitle: We handle everything from A to Z. You focus on your business. Here is how it works.

steps.title: We talk, 30 minutes is enough
steps.description: A call or a WhatsApp message. In 30 minutes, we understand your agency, your routes, your departures, your challenges. No technical jargon, no endless forms. A real business conversation.

steps.title: We configure your platform in your brand
steps.description: Your routes, your schedules, your fares, your colours, your logo. We set up your ResaBus space from A to Z. Your customers will see your modernised agency, not Transport Facile. The technology is ours, the platform is yours.

steps.title: Your customers book. You collect.
steps.description: Within 48h of our first exchange, your agency is online. Your customers book their tickets and parcels from their phones. Your revenue is centralised and accessible at any time, from your office or your home.

socialProof.title: What our partners say
socialProof.subtitle: Agency managers who chose digital. In their own words.

testimonials.quote: Before Transport Facile, I counted my tickets by hand at the end of the day. Now I see my revenue in real time from my phone. I save at least two hours a day, and my revenue has increased because customers book even at night.

testimonials.quote: My customers used to come from far away to book at the counter. Now they do it from home with Wave, and my buses leave on time with much less chaos. The queue has halved, and my agents are less stressed.

testimonials.quote: I was afraid it would be complicated for my agents. In one hour of training, everyone knew how to use the platform. In 48h, we were operational. What I had been waiting for for years.

socialProof.bottomText: Ready to join the agencies that are ahead of the curve?

about.title2: We built the tools it deserves.
about.p1: Transport Facile was born from a simple observation: intercity transport in Côte d'Ivoire handles millions every day, and yet most agencies still operate with a notebook, a pen, and a lot of goodwill.
about.p2Start: Our answer: powerful digital tools developed entirely in-house:
about.p2End: for shipments, deployed and personalised for each partner agency. And more modules are on the way.
about.p3Start: We don't sell a generic application. We build
about.p3End: , with your colours, your rules, your identity. What your customers see is your agency, modernised.

values.title: Technology built for your market
values.description: Our tools are designed for the realities of Ivorian transport: early morning departures, Abidjan–Bouaké routes, customers paying via Mobile Money or Wave, urgent parcels. Not an imported solution that doesn't understand your terrain.

values.title: Your image. Your brand. Your platform.
values.description: Each partner agency gets its own platform: its name, its colours, its fares, its routes. Your customers don't see Transport Facile. They see your agency — modernised and professional. The technology is ours. The platform is yours.

values.title: A lasting relationship, not just a contract
values.description: We don't hand you a tool and disappear. Your success is our success. We monitor your performance, update your platform, are available when you need help, and continuously develop new modules for your agency.

faq.subtitle: These questions come up in every first conversation. We answer them honestly, without jargon.

faqs.q: How exactly does commission-based payment work?
faqs.a: You pay nothing upfront: no setup fee, no monthly subscription. Transport Facile takes only a commission on tickets sold online through your platform. If you sell 0 tickets, you pay 0 FCFA. The commission ranges from 2.5% (Pro plan) to 3% (Essential plan) of the ticket price. It is automatically deducted per transaction: you receive the rest directly.

faqs.q: Do my customers need a smartphone or internet?
faqs.a: Your customers simply need a phone capable of receiving an SMS or WhatsApp message — even a basic phone is enough to receive the ticket. To book, they can also go through a family member with a smartphone. The platform is optimised for slow connections (3G, Edge) and small mobile screens.

faqs.q: What happens if the internet goes down at the station during boarding?
faqs.a: Your agent can verify tickets in offline mode for a short period. Data is synchronised automatically as soon as the connection returns. As a last resort, the customer can show the confirmation SMS they received, which your agent verifies manually. We are also working on a full offline mode for areas with low network coverage.

faqs.q: How long does the setup actually take?
faqs.a: In practice, your platform is configured and operational within 48h of our first exchange. Here is the process: Day 1, we configure your routes, schedules, fares and visual identity (logo, colours). Day 2, we train your team (1 hour is enough) and run a real test departure. Your customers can book from the next day. Counter staff training is included.

faqs.q: Do I keep my physical counter? Do my agents lose their jobs?
faqs.a: Absolutely not. Transport Facile complements your counter — it does not replace it. Your agents continue selling tickets in person for customers who prefer to come in. The platform simplifies their work: no more manual counting, no more unclear end-of-day cash reports. Many partner agencies have found that their agents spend less time managing queues and more time serving customers well.

faqs.q: Who can see my revenue data? Is it confidential?
faqs.a: Your data belongs to your agency, full stop. Transport Facile only accesses your revenue data when a declared technical need arises and with your agreement. We never share it with third parties. All data is encrypted in transit (HTTPS) and at rest. We apply data security best practices (agency-level isolation, restricted access).

faqs.q: Can I manage multiple routes, multiple departures and multiple stations from a single interface?
faqs.a: Yes, that is precisely one of the platform's strengths. You manage all your routes, all your schedules, all your fares from a single dashboard. You can create as many routes as needed (Abidjan–Bouaké, Abidjan–Man, Abidjan–San Pedro…), set different schedules by day, and update fares in real time. Enterprise agencies have an infrastructure entirely dedicated to their network.

faqs.q: What happens if a customer wants a refund or cancels their ticket?
faqs.a: The refund policy is defined by your agency, not by Transport Facile. You retain full control over your terms and conditions. Our dashboard allows you to manage cancellations and refunds manually or automatically, according to the rules you define. The customer is automatically notified by SMS or WhatsApp as soon as the refund is processed.

faq.bottomSubtitle: We reply on WhatsApp within a few hours. No script, a real conversation.
